config.phpVersion: Target PHP version. Auto detects Composer constraints or an installed PHP executable.
config.phpExecutablePath: Optional PHP executable used for version detection.
config.pasteImportsMode: Controls automatic import updates when PHP code is pasted.
config.includeTextMatches: Controls updates to class-name matches in strings and configuration files.
config.syncFileName: Rename a matching PHP file together with its primary class-like declaration.
config.enablePhpStormKeybindings: Enable PHP-specific PhpStorm keybindings such as Shift+F6.
